text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm making my way home with Mejiro Dober after
checking out the stores around the station when...

text_block_list.name: Girl A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Dad? Can we stop by the shrine festival on
the way home? Pleeease?

text_block_list.name: Girl's Father
text_block_list.text: All right, but we're only staying for a little while.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh. I didn't know there was a festival today.
choice_data_list: Would you like to go take a look?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What?! N-no... I never said I wanted to!
choice_data_list: Well, I'd like to check it out, so let's go.
Well, I'd like to check it out, so let's go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, it's all right. I just didn't know it was
happening.
choice_data_list: Well, I'd like to check it out, so let's go.
Well, I'd like to check it out, so let's go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? B-but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? B-but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Geez. You're so pushy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Fine. But just for a bit.
Berry? Is that you?
Berry? Is that you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: D-Dad?! What are you doing here?!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
I'm here on a business trip. I was just on my way to
see you, Berry!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! I'm not a child anymore, so stop calling me
that!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
Haha, of course. A child couldn't be working so
hard at Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
You must be her trainer. Thank you for always
taking care of my daughter. I've heard so much
about you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I-it's not like I talk about you all the time! I just
keep him updated on how things are going.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well... I can't really tell him about how things are
going without mentioning you.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
Dober says she really appreciates all you do for
her. Keep up the good work!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
Dober says she really appreciates all you do for
her. Keep up the good work!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Cut it out already!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Stop being such a busybody, Dad! I can thank her
myself.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
A festival, eh? Brings back memories... I
remember taking you to one when you were little.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
A festival, eh? Brings back memories... I
remember taking you to one when you were little.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...That was ages ago.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
At the very end of the festival, they sent up the
fireworks, and you reacted in the sweetest way.

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Look at all the shooting stars! I have to
hurry and make a wish before they're gone!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Those aren't shooting stars, honey. They're
called fireworks.

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
What?! No way, they're definitely shooting stars!
They're gonna make my wish come true!

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text:
Star light, star bright, I wish to become a big,
strong racer who can win any race!

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text: That's how I remember it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What's with that look on your face? Wipe it off
this second!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
D-don't laugh at me! I know the difference
between them now.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I'm just glad you're doing well. Ever since
you started competing, I've been worried you've
been pushing yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
Haha. I'm just glad you're doing well. Ever since
you started competing, I've been worried you've
been pushing yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Dober's Father
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wish I could stay longer, but I have to get
going. I'll see you later, Berry.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Dad! How many times do I have to tell you to
stop... Ugh, never mind. Bye, Dad.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh. I thought I'd grown after I started competing seriously...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But if I'm still making him worry, it must mean I
have a long way to go.
choice_data_list: Hey, no need to get down about that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I-I'm not! This has nothing to do with you anyway!
choice_data_list:
Let's work even harder to show him how great
you've become.
Your dad's already proud of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I know... But it still bothers me.
choice_data_list:
Let's work even harder to show him how great
you've become.
Your dad's already proud of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Even harder...
choice_data_list: Hard enough to relieve him of his worries!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Even harder...
choice_data_list: Hard enough to relieve him of his worries!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't need you giving me a pep talk! I'm going
to win all my races and make a name for myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. Instead of sitting around and being
sad about it, I need to do something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...And I'm going to do it by growing faster,
stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to grow faster and stronger—strong
enough to hold my head up high for my dad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's determination gleams brilliantly in
her intense gaze.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's determination gleams brilliantly in
her intense gaze.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? And how would you know that?
choice_data_list: I could tell how important you are to him.
I could tell how important you are to him.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...How can you know? You're not him.
choice_data_list: I could tell how important you are to him.
I could tell how important you are to him.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...To him, I'm still his little girl. He's always been
overprotective, always worried sick over every
little—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Then you get how I feel, right? It hurts
because I know how much he loves me. I don't
want to make him worried all the time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Maybe if I grow stronger, he'll see I can stand on my own.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's why I need to grow faster and
stronger—strong enough to hold my head up high
for my dad!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though she acts annoyed at her father, her drive
to grow as a racer is sincere and firm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's determination gleams brilliantly in
her intense gaze.
